title: GitSetupGetResponse
description: Typed response carrying broker-owned git setup and configuration state.

request_id.description: Stable request correlation identifier echoed from the request.

identity_profiles.description: Broker-managed commit identity profiles available for git setup flows.

auth_posture.description: Broker-projected auth posture for the selected provider.

control_plane_state.description: Broker-managed non-policy git setup state for the selected provider.

policy_surface.description: Explicit boundary contract showing that repo policy remains artifact-managed only.

artifact_managed_only.description: Repo policy is authoritative only through reviewed artifacts or manifests.

inspection_supported.description: Whether clients may inspect authoritative repo policy via broker-owned reads.

prepare_changes_supported.description: Whether clients may prepare reviewed policy changes without mutating truth directly.

direct_mutation_supported.description: Direct client-local policy mutation is not supported.
